expression.expression: CASE WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(LAST_ACTION_DATE)) = NULL) THEN NULL WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(LAST_ACTION_DATE)) = '') THEN NULL ELSE to_timestamp(LAST_ACTION_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd"\'T\'"HH:mm:ss') END
CASE WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(LAST_DECISION_DATE)) = NULL) THEN NULL WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(LAST_DECISION_DATE)) = '') THEN NULL ELSE to_timestamp(LAST_DECISION_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd"\'T\'"HH:mm:ss') END
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(APPLICATION_DATE)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d"T"%H24:MI:%f%f.M%f"%%z"', APPLICATION_DATE)) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(APPLICATION_EXPIRY_DATETIME)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d"T"%H24:MI:%f%f.M%f"%%z"', APPLICATION_EXPIRY_DATETIME)) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(ACCOUNT_NUMBER)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(CARD_EXPIRY_DATE)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d"T"%H24:MI:%f%f.M%f"%%z"', CARD_EXPIRY_DATE)) END)

(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS_ACCEPTANCE_TIMESTAMP)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d"T"%H24:MI:%f%f.M%f"%%z"', TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS_ACCEPTANCE_TIMESTAMP)) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(AGREEMENT_SIGNED_TIMESTAMP)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d"T"%H24:MI:%f%f.M%f"%%z"', AGREEMENT_SIGNED_TIMESTAMP)) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(FINAL_DECISION_DATE)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d"T"%H24:MI:%f%f', FINAL_DECISION_DATE)) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(APPLICATION_SCORE)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(APPLICATION_SCORE AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(FIRST_PARTY_FRAUD_SCORE)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(FIRST_PARTY_FRAUD_SCORE AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(CIISCORE)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(CIISCORE AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(DATE_OF_BIRTH)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE (PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_OF_BIRTH)) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(NUMBER_OF_DEPENDENTS)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(NUMBER_OF_DEPENDENTS AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(OFFERED_LIMIT_AMOUNT)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(OFFERED_LIMIT_AMOUNT AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(ANNUAL_SALARY_AMOUNT)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(ANNUAL_SALARY_AMOUNT AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(ANNUAL_INCOME_AMOUNT)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(ANNUAL_INCOME_AMOUNT AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(CREDIT_DECISION_FINAL_CREDIT_LIMIT_OFFER)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(CREDIT_DECISION_FINAL_CREDIT_LIMIT_OFFER AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(CREDIT_DECISION_ANNUAL_PERCENTAGE_RATE)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(CREDIT_DECISION_ANNUAL_PERCENTAGE_RATE AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(DELPHI_SCORE)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(DELPHI_SCORE AS STRING) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(CREDIT_REQUESTED_AMOUNT)))) AS STRING) = '') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(CREDIT_REQUESTED_AMOUNT AS STRING) END)
